items.rationale: Thin gold-colored chain necklace visible at top-left with clasp; thin chains typically weigh less. 22K purity assumed based on traditional yellow gold color and regional jewellery styles. Weight estimate conservative for size and thinness.

items.shape_or_design: wider flat linked detailed design necklace
items.rationale: Wider, heavier necklace with detailed design at top-center, typical of heavier traditional gold necklaces. Weight conservatively estimated between 15-25g. Purity assumed likely 22K due to classic Indian style and color.

items.shape_or_design: round gold bead-like design with pendant-like end
items.estimated_material: yellow metal, likely gold with possible beads/stones
items.rationale: Beaded necklace with round gold-like beads and pendant. Weight includes some volume that may be beads/stones, so gold content likely lower hence slightly lower purity estimate 18K. Weight conservatively estimated with medium confidence due to partial occlusion.

items.shape_or_design: multiple stacked circular bangles with intricate design
items.rationale: Set of 4 stacked gold-colored bangles with intricate design, likely hollow but substantial combined weight. Traditional purity of 22K assumed. Weight range conservatively sized for typical bangle weights.
Pair of small floral gold-colored earrings, relatively light weight estimated conservatively between 2-3 grams total. Assumed likely 22K purity consistent with other items.

assumptions: Gold rate taken as 12435 INR per gram for 22K and 10174 INR per gram for 18K from source Goodreturns dated 23 March 2026.
Making charges and other levies excluded for conservative estimate.
Purity estimates based on traditional yellow gold color and typical Indian jewellery styles.
Weight ranges based on visible size, style, and typical weights for such jewellery.
Beaded necklace possibly contains beads/stones reducing gold content; thus lower purity assumption.
Counting 4 bangles in set conservatively assuming visible overlapping bangles.
Earrings estimated as paired items with small floral design.
